items.name: Baby Blue OraBella Signature Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Off-shoulder knit sweater featuring the iconic Ora’Bella signature pattern in a soft baby blue tone. Designed with a relaxed neckline that highlights the shoulders and long sleeves that naturally hide the hands, this piece blends cozy comfort with a refined geek-chic aesthetic. The all-over branded motif adds a subtle luxury feel while keeping the look playful and stylish.

🔗 Ora’Bella: https://www.roblox.com/communities/1072106749/OraBella#!/store

Level up your lower fit with the SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Sweatpants Loose. This signature silhouette delivers the ultimate premium baggy streetwear vibe. Featuring a creamy lumina pink base with custom artistic gradients to match the collection. Designed for a high-end urban aesthetic and maximum comfort.

[ MATCHING SET ]
Complete the look! This item is designed to pair perfectly with the SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Hoodie Boxy. Find the matching hoodie in our store for the full elite Y2K set!
